subtitles.original: ...curiosity.
As the curious Kronii continued observing,

subtitles.original: a desire grew within her to visit not only the heavenly realm, but also the human world,

subtitles.original: where she could talk to people and play tricks on them.

subtitles.original: 今 今 今 嫌嫌 嫌嫌 嫌嫌 嫌嫌 嫌
subtitles.english: Now, now, now, no, no, no!

subtitles.original: この世で 造花より 綺麗な 花は 無いわ
subtitles.english: There is no flower in this world more beautiful than an artificial one.

subtitles.original: 何故ならば 総ては 嘘で 出来ている antipathy world
subtitles.english: Because everything is made of lies, an antipathy world.

subtitles.original: レンダリラ
絶望の 雨は あたしの 傘を 突いて
subtitles.english: The rain of despair beats against my umbrella,

subtitles.original: 湿らす 前髪と こころの 裏面
subtitles.english: dampening my bangs and the flip side of my heart.

subtitles.original: 煩わしいわ
何時しか 言の葉は 疾うに 枯れきって
subtitles.english: Before I knew it, the words had already completely withered,

subtitles.original: 事の実が あたしに 熟れている
subtitles.english: and the fruits of reality are ripening on me.

subtitles.original: 鏡に 映り 嘘を描いて 自らを見失なった 絵画
subtitles.english: A painting that lost sight of itself, drawing lies reflected in the mirror.

subtitles.original: パパッ パラパッパ ララッパッパ
謎々 かぞえて 遊びましょう
タタッタラ タッ タラ ラッタッタ
何故 何故 此処で 踊っているでしょう
subtitles.english: why, why are we dancing here?

subtitles.original: 簡単なことも 解らないわ あたしって 何だっけ
subtitles.english: I don't even understand simple things, what was I again?

subtitles.original: それすら 夜の手を 絆されて 愛のように 消える
subtitles.english: Even that is bound by the hands of the night, disappearing like love.

subtitles.original: さようならも 言えぬ儘 泣いた フォニイ
subtitles.english: I cried without even being able to say goodbye, a phony.

subtitles.original: 嘘に 絡まっている あたしは フォニイ
subtitles.english: Entangled in lies, I am a phony.

subtitles.original: antipathy world
